title: Cardboard
description: Implements the Bukkit/Spigot/Paper API as a Fabric mod.
body:
# Cardboard   [![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join-7289DA?logo=discord&style=flat)](https://discord.gg/4Ffyw34nWT)   [![iCommon](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-iCommonLib-black?style=flat)](https://modrinth.com/mod/icommon) Cardboard is a Fabric mod that adds support for the popular Bukkit/Spigot/Paper modding API. This mod lets you use plugins that are made for Bukkit and it's derivatives (Spigot & Paper) with Fabric. Cardboard is still in development and **will not** support every plugin. ### Versions 1.21.1, **1.21.11**, **26.1.2**
*Note: Only latest version is actively supported* # Server This project is partnered with ApexHosting! Join our test server, `cardboardmod.apexmc.co:25666`, or get a Minecraft server by clicking on the banner below: ## License We inherit the license from Paper. See [Paper's License](https://github.com/PaperMC/Paper/blob/master/LICENSE.md).
